title: 🔥BTC.D攀升至58.5%，避险潮挤压山寨
body: 市场进入“结构性避险”阶段。核心在于 BTC.D 逆势升至 58.5%，7 日涨幅 0.4%。BTC 价格下跌 5.2% 而市值占比上升，表明资金正加速逃离山寨币回流 BTC 寻求防御。Aave 削减 40% 回购预算及收入下滑 25%，直接印证了非 BTC 资产的基本面恶化与流动性退潮。当前资金结构呈现典型的存量博弈特征，山寨板块风险尚未出清。流动性寒冬下，谁还在为山寨币买单？
title_en: 🔥BTC.D Soars to 58.5%, Safe-Haven Rush Squashes Altcoins
body_en: The market has entered a "structural safe-haven" phase. The core is that BTC.D has surged against the trend to 58.5%, with a 7-day increase of 0.4%. Despite a 5.2% decline in BTC price, its market share has risen, indicating that capital is accelerating its exodus from altcoins back to BTC for defensive purposes. Aave's 40% cut in repurchase budget and a 25% decline in revenue directly reflect the worsening fundamentals and liquidity retreat of non-BTC assets. The current capital structure shows typical characteristics of a zero-sum game, with the altcoin sector's risks yet to be cleared. In the face of a liquidity winter, who's still paying the bills for altcoins?
